summary: Team Role Assignment Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: All 13 tests passed - GET /api/users/by-role/{role} returns correctly filtered users for all 7 roles (architect, project_manager, sr_site_engineer, site_engineer, cre, qc, procurement). GET/PATCH /api/projects/{project_id}/team endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Team tab shows 7 role cards with correct data-testid attributes, Edit Team dialog has 7 dropdowns each fetching role-specific users, save/clear functionality working with toast notifications.
critical_code_review_comments: TEAM_ROLES constant correctly defines 7 roles with keys, labels, dbRole, and colors
fetchTeamData correctly fetches team data from GET /api/projects/{project_id}/team
openTeamEditDialog fetches users per role in parallel using Promise.all
handleTeamSave correctly handles '__none__' value to clear assignments
Backend GET /api/users/by-role/{role} correctly filters by role and excludes inactive users
Backend PATCH /api/projects/{project_id}/team correctly validates roles and updates team data

test_credentials.Planning User: Demo Access -> Quick Access -> Planning button (planning@constructionos.com)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team role assignment feature fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/users/by-role/{role} (7 roles), GET/PATCH /api/projects/{project_id}/team. Frontend: Team tab in ProjectDetail.jsx with 7 role cards (data-testid='team-role-{key}'), Edit Team dialog with 7 dropdowns (data-testid='team-select-{key}'), Save Team button (data-testid='confirm-team-assign'). QC role has 0 users in system. Users found: 1 architect, 1 project_manager, 4 sr_site_engineer, 6 site_engineer, 1 cre, 0 qc, 1 procurement.
